name: Journal
description: Today landing with fast-capture, journal, due tasks, and habit check-ins
longDescription: A daily home for your workspace. Open the app and land on today — jot journal entries, quick-capture ideas, see tasks due, and check in on active habits, all in one view. Each day is a markdown collection on disk; captures are timestamped and addressable, not buried in prose.
author: Bootstrapp

name: Templates
longDescription: Scaffold notes, task lists, and websites from a curated library of templates. Every other Bootstrapp extension can contribute its own templates here, making this the single entry point for bootstrapping new resources.
author: Bootstrapp

name: Notes
description: Lightweight note-taking with tags, search, and meeting templates
longDescription: A fast, keyboard-driven note-taking workspace. Capture thoughts in Markdown, organize with tags, run full-text search across every note, and bootstrap common formats (meetings, journals, 1:1s) from built-in templates. Designed to stay out of your way — no accounts, no lock-in, data stays local.
author: Bootstrapp

name: Tasks
description: Task lists and kanban boards with priorities and due dates
longDescription: Track what you're working on across lists and kanban boards. Set priorities, due dates, and statuses; filter by any combination; and move cards between columns with drag-and-drop. Templates cover common flows like weekly planning, sprint boards, and personal triage.
author: Bootstrapp

name: Finance
description: Track income, expenses, and balances across multiple accounts
longDescription: A personal-finance ledger built into your workspace. Register accounts, log income and expenses, categorize transactions, and see balances update live. Supports multiple currencies, recurring entries, and per-category budgeting without the bloat of a full accounting suite.
author: Bootstrapp

name: Challenges
description: Set and track personal challenges with metrics and timelines
longDescription: Turn goals into measurable challenges. Define a metric, a target, and a timeline; log progress entries; and see streaks, momentum, and completion percentage at a glance. Great for habits, training plans, reading lists, and anything that needs sustained progress over time.
author: Bootstrapp

name: GitHub
description: Sync your workspace to a GitHub repository via OAuth
longDescription: Back up and version-control your entire Bootstrapp workspace on GitHub. Authorize once with OAuth, pick a repository, and every change can be committed and pushed from the command palette. Supports public and private repos, branch selection, and lightweight conflict resolution.
author: Bootstrapp

name: Pages
description: Build and publish static websites to GitHub Pages
longDescription: Turn collections of notes and pages into a deployable static website. Choose a theme, drag pages into a sitemap, preview locally, and publish straight to GitHub Pages with one click. Perfect for blogs, portfolios, docs sites, and lightweight marketing pages.
author: Bootstrapp
